parsed_review.summary: Read-only inspection of CP00-766 (Risk C, 150 units, RP25.P03.M06.S11-RP25.P04.M03.S18, descriptor-only Migration Platform UI-foundation pack) confirms the pack is internally consistent and its evidence supports closeout. Implementation (registry/service/validators/index/import-plan/mappers) is deeply frozen and descriptor-only under MIGRATION_PLATFORM_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION; the CP766 descriptor validator additionally rejects UI runtime-render claims (validators.js:971). model.test.js (399-446) asserts CP766 binding, coverage == required deliverable counts (test:15, hermes_evidence:7, claude_review:10, implementation:52, contract:17, security_audit:16, ui:30, fixture:3 = 150), the 9-section descriptor, runtime-closed Hermes/Claude packets, and the full cp756-cp766 contract projection chain. The generated contract shows validation.valid with 23 valid:true and zero valid:false; no leak flags (import_runtime_opened/writes_product_state/real_client_data_included/cross_tenant_access_allowed/claude_is_final_approval/runtime_render_claimed) are set true anywhere in the package or contract. Command evidence records all required validations (closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack/test/validate/spec:requirements/weighted/fullplan/goal:closeout/rp00:control-plane/git diff --check) at exit_code 0 with overall status passed_pending_hardened_review, and all eight referenced npm scripts resolve to real files. Authority boundaries hold: Claude is read-only and non-final (read_only:true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false), human approval is required to open runtime, and Hermes packets are descriptor-only with emits_runtime_receipt:false (control-plane, not product runtime). Manifest, adjudication, and construction-inspection are correctly staged as pending_review with production_ready:false and review_receipt_ref:null; the prior claude-review-result.json is a 0-byte placeholder, not a counted attempt (invalid_review_attempts:[]), and the readiness auth-preflight passed. This hardened PASS receipt is the single valid pack-level Claude review that adjudicates the descriptor-verified production_ready flag. Two P3 informational notes, both non-blocking; no P0/P1/P2 findings.

findings.title: Contract artifact regenerated via writeFile is control-plane, not a product-state write
findings.details: The validation script writes contracts/migration-platform-contract.json on each run. This is deterministic control-plane contract-projection generation and does not violate the pack's no-write attestation, which scopes to product state, database rows, object storage, source-system runtime, and real/synthetic data. Confirmed via grep that no product-state, import-runtime, or source-system write paths exist in packages/migration, and the MIGRATION_PLATFORM_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (writes_product_state/creates_database_rows/writes_object_storage/import_runtime_opened all false) is propagated through freezeResult into every descriptor/packet.
findings.recommendation: No action. Keep contract generation classified as deterministic control-plane (imported_pattern: deterministic_control_plane_review_packet_and_receipt) and continue excluding it from product-runtime no-write guarantees.

findings.title: Pre-review placeholder claude-review-result.json shows 0-byte stdout and PENDING_REVIEW
findings.details: The staged result shows raw_output.stdout_bytes:0 and parsed_review.overall_verdict PENDING_REVIEW with terminal_reason pending_review. This is the pre-review placeholder, not a counted invalid attempt (invalid_review_attempts:[], exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run:false), and the readiness auth-preflight passed (exit_code 0, 1432-byte JSON result). Under CP178+ hardening a 0-byte stdout must never be counted as valid review evidence, so this placeholder must be superseded by this hardened receipt rather than satisfy the exactly-one-valid-review requirement itself.
findings.recommendation: Normalize this hardened PASS receipt as the single valid pack-level Claude review and ensure the 0-byte placeholder is excluded from the exactly-one-valid-review count before flipping production_ready.
